commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Gradle test system property to turn Robolectric Conscrypt mode off for Android JVM unit tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence local reproduction: I did not run the failing task on Linux ARM64. Source inspection does show Robolectric 4.16.1 defaults Conscrypt ON on Linux and Conscrypt 2.5.2 lacks a Linux aarch64 native library.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof from the Raspberry Pi/aarch64 setup before normal maintainer review or merge; automation cannot supply that proof for the external contributor.
